title: neomammillaria roseoalba
intro: Neomammillaria roseoalba, also known as the White Rose Prickly Pear, is a species of cactus native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant is known for its white or pink flowers and its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Neomammillaria roseoalba include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
